channel.title: AIIB Job Vacancies
channel.description: Current job opportunities at Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB)

item.title: Senior Investment Officer, Financial Sponsor Debt Business
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer, Financial Sponsor Debt Business. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 07, 2026.

item.title: Senior Investment Officer - Water & Urban
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer - Water & Urban. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Mar 31, 2026.

item.title: Senior Investment Officer - NSBF
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer - NSBF. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Mar 31, 2026.

item.title: Senior Investment Officer, Multi sector (Infrastructure)
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer, Multi sector (Infrastructure). Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Mar 31, 2026.

item.title: Finance Officer, Loan Management
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Finance Officer, Loan Management. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 06, 2026.
